data.body:
## Description
In record-test-status.sh, add check after the existing exit_code -ne 0 && red_marker block: when exit_code == 0 and red_marker is set, emit 'STALE RED MARKER: ${test_file} (marker: ${red_marker}) — all RED-zone tests passed; remove the [${red_marker}] marker from .test-index' to stderr, set STATUS=failed. Include inline comment block documenting the new stale detection behavior.

## TDD Requirement
Task 1's RED test (test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero) must now pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero.*PASS'
- [ ] Existing RED marker tolerance tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_red_marker_tolerates_failure_after_marker.*PASS'
